meta.source: Anni, K., Vainik, U., & Mõttus, R. (2024). Personality Profiles of 263 Occupations. Journal of Applied Psychology.
meta.table: S6 — Big Five personality profiles, weighted n=50
meta.iscoMapping: 959 O*NET codes mapped via ESCO crosswalk + ESCO occupation taxonomy: 782 direct ISCO-4d, 136 imputed from ISCO-3d siblings, 22 imputed from ISCO-2d siblings, 5 imputed from SOC-detail siblings, 14 hand-curated for codes without any crosswalk or sibling
